song.title: Deep Cries Out
song.lyrics: [V1] I've got a river of living water A fountain that never will run dry It's an open Heavn You're releasing And we will never be denied [P1] Cause we're stirring up Deep, deep wells We're stirring up deep, deep waters We're going to dance in the river Dance in the river [P2] Cause we're stirring up Deep, deep wells We're stirring up deep, deep waters We're going to jump in the river Jump in the river [C] Deep cries out Deep cries out to You Deep cries out Deep cries out to You We cry out to We cry out to You Jesus [B1] We're falling into deeper waters Calling out to You We're walking into deeper waters Going after You [B2] If He goes to the left, Then we'll go to the left And if He goes to the right, Then we'll go to the right We're gonna jump, jump, Jump, jump in the river Jump, jump, jump, jump, everybody [B3] If he goes to the left Then we'll go to the left And if He goes to the right Then we'll go to the right We're gonna dance, dance Dance, dance, in the river Dance, dance, dance, dance, everybody [B4] And if he goes to the right Then we'll go to the right We're gonna jump, jump, Jump, jump everybody If He goes to the left Then we'll go to the left [B5] And if He goes to the right Then we'll go to right Were gonna shout shout Shout shout in the river Shout shout, shout shout
song.author: Bethel Churchi
